title: Kaworus Clones
wikitext:
[]: Kaworu's Clones             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Sat Oct 29, 2011 2:20 pm In my point of view , kaworu can't have clons walking like Rei's 1 2 and 3 Because they can look like the same but their different persons with different personalities I think that the only time kaworu clons where shown is on the eva series plugs , and they aren't even persons as especified by ritsuko "Body's without soul" , just for the dummy plug they aren't living beings plus kaworu is adam's salvaged soul , an angel , his body is just some random persons body who is now kaworu's Tell me, what you think?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sat Oct 29, 2011 3:32 pm There is no technology that the Japanese Nerv branch has and Seele doesn't. Kaworu's resuscitation, if Seele wanted it, is possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Sat Oct 29, 2011 5:16 pm Allemann wrote: There is no technology that the Japanese Nerv branch has and Seele doesn't. Kaworu's resuscitation, if Seele wanted it, is possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sat Oct 29, 2011 5:44 pm They revive him probably with a similar process with which Rei was revived.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Oct 30, 2011 2:05 am ikr. but why would he want to die?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Oct 30, 2011 4:31 am Also, it would be very stupid of SEELE to revive someone who is both insanely powerful and would have a reason to be very pissed at them since they betrayed him and quite obviously planned to send him to his death. Of course, Kaworu's not the vengeful type, but they're paranoid, and... what use would it be to them to bring him back, exactly? Their plan requires him dead. They probably DO have an aquarium full of clones, tough. Also, note the difference that Rei is phisically mostly a human with a little Angel material while Kaworu is a full Angel who simply looks like a human, or , if you go by the theory that he was spawned by the inserting-human-DNA-into-Adam experiment, (Which may or may not have been confirmed by Rebuild creating VERY disturbing Fridge logic for ep 24) mostly an Angel with a little human material. The "mix ratio" is quite different - that might or might not make a difference.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sun Oct 30, 2011 7:48 am Kendrix wrote: Rei is phisically mostly a human with a little Angel material while Kaworu is a full Angel who simply looks like a human

[]:             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Sun Oct 30, 2011 12:18 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Rei's clones are soulless vessels. Presumably any Kaworu clones would be too.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Oct 30, 2011 2:59 pm SEELE was taking care of Kaworu for like fifteen years, getting a DNA sample shouldn't be hard.

[]:             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Tue Nov 01, 2011 2:36 pm Kendrix wrote: Also, it would be very stupid of SEELE to revive someone who is both insanely powerful and would have a reason to be very pissed at them since they betrayed him and quite obviously planned to send him to his death.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Tue Nov 01, 2011 2:44 pm When taking into account that Kaworu was likely "born" when the donor's DNA was inserted into Adam, it's very likely that SEELE has all sorts of his genetic material.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Tue Nov 01, 2011 2:46 pm The MP Evas' dummy plugs are based on him, so obviously.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Nov 01, 2011 2:58 pm Tsuki No Nagisa wrote: Yeah , but, kaworu was the one who betrayed them.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Tue Nov 01, 2011 3:34 pm Considering neither trusted the other, who betrayed who is a moot point.

[]:             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Tue Nov 01, 2011 9:37 pm Trajan wrote: When taking into account that Kaworu was likely "born" when the donor's DNA was inserted into Adam, it's very likely that SEELE has all sorts of his genetic material.

[]: As it is. B/             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Tue Nov 01, 2011 10:12 pm Tsuki No Nagisa wrote: Wasn't he born in the process of second impact?

[]: Re: As it is. B/             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Wed Nov 02, 2011 8:33 am Alaska Slim wrote: He was born out of the first contact experiment . 2nd impact occurred later, and partially as a result of the former.

[]: Re: As it is. B/             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Fri Nov 04, 2011 3:22 pm Alaska Slim wrote: He was born out of the first contact experiment . 2nd impact occurred later, and partially as a result of the former.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Nov 05, 2011 2:33 pm SOMEONE inserted their DNA into Adam. Maybe they were there, maybe they weren't. If the person was required to be there, it's likely that donor was Dr. Katsuragi, Misato's father. If the person didn't need to be there and they just shoved in a DNA sample, I like to think it was Gendo, so that Kaworu's parallelism with Rei is completed full-circle.

[]:             Quote Post by Aozora » Mon Nov 07, 2011 6:44 pm Hm, I don't know that there is a tank of clones for Kaworu like there is for Rei. Gendo was trying to keep Rei a secret, wasn't he (trying to hide that she died in ep 23, not letting Seele interogate her)? The dummy plug system is based on digital souls, not soulless bodies. So the dummy plugs in EoE with Kaworu written on the side aren't an indication that there are Kaworu clones.

Article: Kaworus Clones
 Mon Nov 07, 2011 6:44 pm Hm, I don't know that there is a tank of clones for Kaworu like there is for Rei. Gendo was trying to keep Rei a secret, wasn't he (trying to hide that she died in ep 23, not letting Seele interogate her)? The dummy plug system is based on digital souls, not soulless bodies. So the dummy plugs in EoE with Kaworu written on the side aren't an indication that there are Kaworu clones.
